meta.phase-name: Stat Control Flattening and Currency Stats Models

phase-plan.purpose: Simplify stat editing UI and formalize vector stats as reusable model-level stat schemas.
phase-plan.scope: Remove Space Movement controls and merge-inbox panel from Space Explorer controls, flatten Features content directly into Stat Control, add CurrencyStats and currency model inheritance, and keep schema generation aligned with explicit inheritance.

file.description: UI cleanup and stat model inheritance additions (`currencystats` -> `currency`, `combatstats` -> entity/item).
